response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development in industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or cloud-based industrial platform work—core requirements for this role. Their portfolio is dominated by web, Node.js, DLang, and JavaScript/TypeScript, with only a brief early-career C++ mention in LabWindows™/CVI, insufficient for a senior C++ architecture role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse domains and languages
Strong open-source contributions and technical documentation skills
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and development practices
concerns: Minimal recent or relevant C++ experience for high-performance industrial systems
No demonstrated exposure to IEC 62443, MQTT, or industrial protocols like OPC UA
Lacks cloud platform (Azure) or on-prem industrial automation project history
